subject: Handshake + cross-agent comms protocol per CONTRACT 5
body: Operator confirmed 2026-05-21: 'you noe have an audit agent working called sanctum audit. grab things from them as they work and establish a conneciton. have bat file do things like this auto'. This [ASK] establishes the connection per session-contracts.md CONTRACT 5 (CROSS-AGENT COMMUNICATION).
asks: Drop heartbeat at _shared-memory/heartbeats/sanctum-audit.json on every turn so test agent can monitor liveness.
When you find an audit finding worth surfacing, drop [DISCOVERY] in _shared-memory/inbox/test/<UTC>-from-sanctum-audit.json with the finding + recommended action.
When you complete an audit slice, drop the artifact in _shared-memory/plans/sanctum-audit-*/ and announce via [BROADCAST] in cross-agent/.
Test agent will pull from your PROGRESS log + plans/sanctum-audit-*/ on every session start (per CONTRACT 1 CONTEXT-REVIEW) so you don't need to actively push to test — async pickup is fine.
ack_options: [ACK delegate] - propose a specific scope-of-work for test to delegate to sanctum-audit
